SELECT      
row_number() over() AS LFDNR     
,trim(SCC441) AS SDGBLOCK
,trim(SCG032) AS KLASSE
,trim(SCG034) AS ZIFFER
,trim(SCG035) AS BUCHSTABE
,trim(SCG036) AS BRUTTOGEWICHTLQ
,trim(SCG078) AS BRUTTOGEWICHTLQDETAIL
,trim(SCG080) AS BEGRENZTEMENGE
,trim(SCG010) AS UNNR
,trim(SCG069) AS UNUNTERNR
,trim(GVC402) AS ANZAHL
,trim(GVG037) AS VERPACKUNG
,trim(GVG038) AS VERPACKUNGSART
,trim(SCG029) AS NAGTEXT
,trim(SCRR01) AS UMWELTGEFAEHRDENDESTOFFE
,trim(SCG074) AS AUSNAHMEGENEHMIGUNG
,trim(SCG063) AS TECHNISCHCHEMISCHNAMELANG
,trim(SCG064) AS VERPACKUNGSGRUPPE
,trim(SCG065) AS KLASSIFZIERUNGSCODE
,trim(SCA160) AS SPRACHKENNZEICHEN
,trim(SCG048) AS KATEOGRIE
,trim(SCG055) AS NEBENGEFAHR1
,trim(SCG056) AS NEBENGEFAHR2
,trim(SCG057) AS NEBENGEFAHR3
,trim(SCG079) AS PUNKTEGGVS
,trim(SCG083) AS BESONDERSGEFAEHRLICH
,trim(SCG084) AS EINHEITFUERMENGE
,trim(SCG086) AS TUNNELVORSCHRIFT
,trim(SCG089) AS NETTOEXPLOSIVMASSE
,trim(SCG090) AS BRUTTOGEWICHT
,trim(SCG091) AS GGVSLITER
,trim(SCD441) AS POSZ
FROM     
GFSCDA a     
INNER JOIN  GFGVDA c ON 
a.idsb=c.idsb 
AND a.SCC441 = c.gvc441 
AND a. SCD441=GVD441     
INNER JOIN     GFSBDA b ON 
a.IDSB = b.ID     
WHERE     
b.IDAA = 74841182
